name: Haridwar Rishikesh Tour
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Haridwar, Rishikesh with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Delhi to Haridwar, Today, Morning meet our driver at your Home | Hotel | Airport
itinerary.description: Delhi to Haridwar, Today, Morning meet our driver at your Home | Hotel | Airport | Railway Station and transfer to Haridwar. Check in to the hotel at Arrival in Haridwar/Rishikesh. Afternoon visit Daksh Temple, Pawan Dham as well as Moti Bazar. Go To Har Ki Pauri for Ganga Aarti. Return to the hotel. Dinner and Night stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Sightseeing with Rishikesh: Morning you can take a divine dip in the river Ganga
itinerary.description: Sightseeing with Rishikesh: Morning you can take a divine dip in the river Ganga. Later on, returne to hotel. After breakfast visit Mansa Devi Temple (By cable car). Transfer to Rishikesh. Go to Triveni Ghat, Bharat Mandir, Lakshman Temple, Lakshman Jhula as well as Ram Jhula. Evening visit Ganga Aarti at Parmarth Niketan. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Haridwar To Delhi – Morning after breakfast, check out from the hotel
itinerary.description:
Haridwar To Delhi – Morning after breakfast, check out from the hotel. Go to Chandi Devi Temple (by cable car). Transfer to Delhi. Dropping at Delhi home/ hotel/ airport/ railway station.
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours

itinerary.title: Delhi: Arrival Delhi & drop you hotel & after breakfast proceed to sightseeing O
itinerary.description: Delhi: Arrival Delhi & drop you hotel & after breakfast proceed to sightseeing Old and New Delhi. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Haridwar (250 Kms
itinerary.description: Delhi to Haridwar (250 Kms. 6 Hrs.): After breakfast proceed to . Haridwar check in at the hotel & after refresh proceed to go Har-Ki-Podi for evening Ganga AArti. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: After breakfast visit Laxman Jhula, Ram Jhula and Temples
itinerary.description: After breakfast visit Laxman Jhula, Ram Jhula and Temples. Rest of the day at leisure.
